message:
feat(storage,search,analytics): add busy-retry resilience, re-enable FTS5 search, fix dedup and query performance

SQLite busy-retry resilience (storage/sqlite.rs):
- Add four open_franken_*_with_timeout() variants that implement exponential
  backoff (4ms-128ms) with deadline for busy/locked/contention errors
- Add retryable_franken_error() and retryable_franken_anyhow() helpers that
  match FrankenError::Busy, BusyRecovery, BusySnapshot, WriteConflict,
  SerializationFailure plus string heuristics for edge cases
- Add into_raw() method on FrankenStorage to expose underlying connection
- Scope message dedup fingerprint lookups (franken_existing_message_
  fingerprints_by_idx, franken_existing_message_replay_fingerprints) to
  incoming message idx/created_at ranges instead of fixed LIMIT 1000 tail
  windows, preventing missed dedup on large session rescans
- Detect and skip duplicate idx values and replay-equivalent messages within
  a single insert batch in insert_conversation_tree, with tracing warnings
- Normalize source_id and origin_host by trimming whitespace in
  ensure_source_for_conversation; treat blank source IDs without origin_host
  as SourceKind::Local
- Replace rusqlite-based FTS queryability check in probe_historical_bundle
  with historical_bundle_fts_queryable_via_frankensqlite using
  FrankenStorage::open_readonly
- Add tests for duplicate message indices, batched reprocessing idempotency,
  and blank source classification

FTS5 search re-enablement (search/query.rs):
- Fully implement search_sqlite_fts5 fallback path with real SQL joins
  against fts_messages, messages, conversations, and sources tables,
  applying all SearchFilters (agents, workspaces, time range, source filter)
- Add sqlite_fts_uses_message_id_column() to introspect FTS schema for
  correct join column selection (message_id vs rowid)
- Fix FTS5 query transpiler: split hyphenated terms into AND-joined fragments
  matching porter tokenizer behavior instead of quoting them
- Rewrite normalize_term_parts to split on non-alphanumeric/non-underscore
  characters while preserving trailing wildcards
- Add local franken_query_map_collect_retry and franken_query_rows_retry
  wrappers for per-query busy retry
- Switch SearchClient::ensure_connection to FrankenStorage::open with retry
  fallback

Two-tier vector index ordering fix (two_tier_search.rs):
- Fix TwoTierIndex::build to rebuild doc_ids and message_ids arrays in
  frankensearch's canonical sort order using doc_id_at() after index build,
  fixing divergence between side-table and internal index ordering
- Add test_side_tables_follow_frankensearch_index_order test

Analytics session scatter refactor (analytics/query.rs):
- Restructure query_session_scatter to use per-message subquery computing
  message_api_tokens and event_ts_ms, with outer GROUP BY aggregation
- Move timestamp normalization into subquery with explicit CASE chains
- Apply time filters against subquery's event_ts_ms

Summary page query optimization (pages/summary.rs):
- Rewrite workspace and agent summary methods to avoid N+1 correlated
  subqueries: fetch all conversations in one pass, batch-lookup names by ID,
  aggregate in-memory using HashMap
- Add count_messages_for_conversation_ids helper using IN clauses
- Remove prepend_params helper
- Sort results in Rust rather than SQL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
